news.title: Fakhrul urges people to ignore 'rumours' over President's resignation
news.snippet: His comments came amid widespread speculations that the President may step down in a day or two, citing ill health.

news.title: Fakhrul vows democratic reforms, economic recovery
news.snippet: He further emphasised regional cooperation, saying Prime Minister Tarique Rahman has pledged to attract greater international participation in Bangladesh's economic development.

news.title: Ctg salt factory fire: Death toll rises to 5 as another with 65% burns passes away
news.snippet: Mahmudul Haque was the latest to die from injuries sustained in the fire.

news.title: Faridpur BNP leader expelled for 'moral turpitude' after viral video
news.snippet: The expelled leader is Md Obaidur Rahman, organising secretary of Aliabad union unit of BNP in Sadar upazila.

news.title: 7 teachers transferred after overseeing HSC exams at waterlogged Cumilla college
news.snippet: Under the order, the seven teachers have been asked to be released from their current workplace by 29 July.

news.title: Heavy rainfall likely in 3 divisions
news.snippet: Cox's Bazar recorded the highest rainfall in the country, with 83mm in the 24 hours until 6am today.

news.title: BGB foils BSF attempt to push in 8 people through Kushtia border
news.snippet: The incident occurred at around 5:10am in the border area under the jurisdiction of the Joypur Border Outpost (BOP) of the Kushtia Battalion (47 BGB).

news.title: Govt appoints heads of 12 agencies, boards and corporations on contract
news.snippet: Eleven appointees get grade-2 status for one-year terms.

news.title: Even I am a victim: BTMA president exposes unchecked extortion in industries
news.snippet: Even Showkat Aziz Russell, president of the Bangladesh Textile Mills Association (BTMA), said he had personally fallen victim to extortion.

news.title: 24 July 2024: When fear became routine
news.snippet: While victims continued to die from their injuries, security operations expanded, offices resumed under curfew restrictions, and the return of internet connectivity began to reveal the scale of the massacre

news.title: Trade deficit widens 24% as exports fall and capital imports slump

news.title: Nvidia, Amkor strike $1.5 billion chip packaging deal
news.snippet: Worth $1.5 billion to expand advanced semiconductor ‌packaging and test capacity in the US, as the chip industry races to build out AI infrastructure.

news.title: Bangladesh’s liver disease pattern shifts as fatty liver cases rise
news.snippet: Hepatitis B cases fell from 51.1% to 44.4% over the decade

news.title: 98.4% of mothers, children in Bangladesh lack health insurance: BBS
news.snippet: The latest BBS MICS survey found that fewer than 2% of mothers and children in Bangladesh are covered by health insurance, highlighting the country's limited financial protection against healthcare costs.

news.title: BB governor urges new Al-Arafah Islami Bank board to step up loan recovery
news.snippet: On 15 July, Bangladesh Bank restored the bank’s shareholder-directors to the board.

news.title: 3 of Bangladeshi family killed in Saudi road crash on way to Umrah
news.snippet: A Bangladeshi family travelling from Riyadh to Makkah to perform Umrah met with a fatal road accident after their car was reportedly struck from behind by a heavy vehicle.

news.title: President Shahabuddin, former ally of ousted PM Hasina, to resign today: Reuters
news.snippet: One source says Shahabuddin informed Tarique on Tuesday and a formal announcement would be made ​on Friday.

news.title: Cenbank moves to scrap 'haircut' on deposits at five merged Islamic banks
news.snippet: Depositors to receive profits at their original contractual rates for 2024 and 2025

news.title: Bangladesh ramps up anti-money laundering reforms before global review
news.snippet: Authorities aim to complete national risk assessments in five key areas by December before an Asia Pacific Group team reviews Bangladesh's preparedness in August.

news.title: President says resignation question 'embarrassing' while Salahuddin says govt 'unaware' of such decision
news.snippet: Asked about reports of a phone conversation with Hasina, Shahabuddin said, “Only when someone has lost their mind will they come up with such concocted stuff. It is baseless, baseless and baseless. Totally baseless.”

news.title: Bangladesh needs $15b annual FDI by 2030 to sustain growth: Ficci
news.snippet: PM invites global investors to partner in Bangladesh’s economic transformation.

news.title: PRI proposes inclusive system to unify digital payments, cut remittance costs
news.snippet: According to the study, the system would be built on the open-source Mojaloop platform to enable instant, low-cost and interoperable transactions across banks, mobile financial service providers and other financial institutions.

news.title: 12 police officers transferred, including 7 Addl SPs and 5 ASPs
news.snippet: The transfers were made through three separate notifications issued by the inspector general of police

news.title: Higher import duty slashes fish imports through Benapole, raises revenue concerns
news.snippet: Traders say the higher duties could reduce fish supplies, push up prices in the domestic market and ultimately lower government revenue if imports continue to decline.

news.title: Bangladesh to host first national semiconductor summit as deep-tech ambitions gather pace
news.snippet: PM Tarique Rahman is expected to inaugurate two-day summit on 25 July

news.title: HC confirms death sentences of five in Khulna father-daughter murder case

news.title: Bida converts $400m of $1.5b investment pipeline
news.snippet: China’s Hengli Group, through its subsidiary Lead Bangladesh Textile Technology Co Ltd, is investing nearly $35 million at the Bangladesh Special Economic Zone (BSEZ) in Araihazar to establish an advanced textile manufacturing facility.

news.title: Dengue death toll reaches 39 as 1 more patient dies in 24hrs

news.title: Cenbank tightens EDF eligibility for overdue borrowers
news.snippet: Manufacturer-exporters who settled EDF liabilities through funded facilities will remain ineligible for fresh loans until their overdue export proceeds are repatriated or exempted by the Discount Committee.

news.title: UGC drafts 5-year roadmap to transform higher education
news.snippet: The draft strategy for 2026-2030 outlines priorities including improving graduate employability, strengthening university-industry links, advancing digital transformation and attracting international students.

news.title: Measles: Death toll rises to 805 as 2 more children die in 24hrs
news.snippet: The number of suspected measles deaths has risen to 710, while laboratory-confirmed deaths now stand at 95.

news.title: HSC exams under Ctg board to resume 27 July
news.snippet: In a press release issued today, a revised schedule for the examinations postponed due to flooding will be announced separately.

news.title: CPA seeks details of rain-damaged cargo after rejecting liability claims
news.snippet: The port on Tuesday (21 July) issued a notice asking C&F agents to submit details of import and export cargo damaged by the flooding at port yards.

news.title: PM invites global investors to partner in Bangladesh's economic transformation
news.snippet: The prime minister promises reforms to attract long-term investment and private sector growth.

news.title: Bangladesh achieves first ventilator-assisted brainstem glioma radiotherapy success
news.snippet: Delivering 30 radiotherapy sessions to a critically ill patient on mechanical ventilation marked a milestone for cancer care in Bangladesh.

news.title: Google Q2 revenue tops expectations as AI, ads drive strong growth
news.snippet: “Our AI investments are redefining what’s possible across every part of our business,” Alphabet CEO Sundar Pichai said in a statement.

news.title: Pubali Bank to buy troubled Bengal Group's 26-storey Swissôtel building for Tk800cr
news.snippet: Lender plans to relocate its head office; Bengal Group expects sale to ease its financial strain.

news.title: Measles death toll crosses 800, experts blame vaccination gaps, weak response
news.snippet: Herd immunity not achieved as more than 40 lakh children remained unvaccinated.

news.title: UGC plans to connect overseas Bangladeshi academics with local universities
news.snippet: The initiative aims to bring Bangladeshi academics abroad and international scholars into teaching and research through a virtual platform as part of a wider digital transformation of higher education.

news.title: Fair Electronics to resume Samsung smartphone production in Bangladesh after 18-month hiatus
news.snippet: Samsung-branded refrigerators are already being produced at Fair Electronics' factory in Narsingdi, while washing machine production is set to begin in September.

news.title: How Bangladeshi expatriates joined the July Uprising from afar
news.snippet: As students bled and the internet was shut down in Bangladesh, expatriates around the world joined the movement in their own ways. Strangers worked together because they shared the same fear, anger and responsibility towards their homeland

news.title: Govt to launch nationwide door-to-door health screening: Health minister
news.snippet: The government will recruit 1 lakh health workers, 80% of them will be women.

news.title: Cabinet body clears Tk 7.34cr contract variation for RUET project

news.title: Late-session sell-off drags DSEX as insurance margin row rattles investors

news.title: PM assures businesses of improving energy supply within a year
news.snippet: The prime minister told BGMEA leaders that government measures to address the energy crisis will become visible within one to one-and-a-half years.

news.title: Facebook, Messenger face outage, users report widespread disruptions
news.snippet: Users reported problems sending messages, refreshing feeds and loading content, while Meta had yet to comment on the disruption.

news.title: Jamuna Bank profit jumps 22% to Tk378cr in H1
news.snippet: During the first half, its consolidated earnings per share stood at Tk4.03, which was Tk3.31 a year ago.

news.title: Govt to launch 'National Health Card' to eliminate healthcare inequality: Faqir Mahbub
news.snippet: The proposed National Health Card will enable nationwide access to patients' medical records, helping improve healthcare access and reduce urban-rural disparities.

news.title: Shifting winds: Bangladesh in an age of fragmented interdependence
news.snippet: As great-power rivalry reshapes global politics, Bangladesh's greatest strategic advantage lies not in choosing sides but in building resilient institutions, diversifying partnerships and practising disciplined multi-alignment

news.title: bKash deploys largest Bangla QR network nationwide to accelerate cashless payment
news.snippet: From neighbourhood grocery stores to pharmacies, restaurants, hotels, supermarkets, lifestyle brands and leading retail chains, customers can now conveniently pay by scanning Bangla QR codes deployed by bKash.

news.title: Measles: Death toll reaches 803 as 6 more children die
news.snippet: Since 15 March, a total of 1,03,078 patients with suspected measles have been hospitalised nationwide, of whom 99,294 have recovered, according to DGHS.

news.snippet: The new rules further allow banks to issue dual-currency freelancer cards.

news.title: Gold prices rise again in Bangladesh within 24 hours
news.snippet: Under the revised pricing, each bhori (11.664 grams) of 21-carat gold will now cost Tk 2,14,093, while 18-carat gold has been set at Tk 1,83,883 per bhori. Traditional gold will sell at Tk 1,50,232 per bhori, the notice said.

news.title: BB suspends assistant director over alleged fraud, crypto transactions, online betting

news.snippet: OpenAI said the breakout was "an unprecedented cyber incident, involving state-of-the-art cyber capabilities" and that the company ⁠was reinforcing its safeguards.

news.title: What Bangladesh's creative economy actually needs

news.title: Healthy diet unaffordable for 38.6% Bangladeshis, South Asia’s second-highest: UN report
news.snippet: The report estimated that 38.6% of Bangladesh's population could not afford a healthy diet last year, compared with 63.0% in Pakistan.

news.title: Health experts stress quality maternal care to cut maternal deaths
news.snippet: The workshop focused on sexual and reproductive health and rights (SRHR), nutrition and the role of the media in raising public awareness.

news.title: Stocks rebound as DSEX jumps 41 points to edge near 5,900 mark

news.title: Tk9,367cr provision gap: BSEC orders Dhaka exchange to ensure lenders' quarterly reporting
news.snippet: According to BSEC data, the total provisioning deficit against negative equity and unrealised losses stood at Tk9,367 crore as of May.

news.title: Teachers should educate students as their own children: Milon
news.snippet: The minister also said coordinated efforts by teachers, parents and education officials are essential to improving primary education, while the government plans to expand teacher training and student welfare programmes.

news.title: Govt returns non-teaching staff recruitment power to MPO school, college governing bodies
news.snippet: The education ministry scrapped the deputy commissioner (DC)-led committee system and restored the previous recruitment process for non-teaching MPO posts.

news.title: JU temporarily expels 8 students over ragging allegations
news.snippet: Freshers allegedly faced mental harassment and intimidation during a late-night incident.

news.title: Iran’s oil supply threat extends beyond Strait of Hormuz
news.snippet: Oil and gas producers in the Gulf are seeking alternatives to the Strait of Hormuz as traffic again comes under fire. But is Iran also turning its attention to the pipelines meant to bypass the waterway?
